title.en: On the other hand, Ye Tian stood still, extreme...

content.en:
"Defeat you in one move!"

The Baili Sword Lord shouted, and immediately slashed out a powerful sword, this sword is a sword master, after all, he has been addicted to sword for a long time, and naturally created a sword master, although it is a very ordinary sword master, but for the average cosmic god, it is also quite amazing.

After all, not everyone is an Eternal Highness or a Supreme Highness, and it is not easy to easily create a peerless school.

Facing the sword of the Baili Sword Master, Ye Tian didn't even take out the sword, and blasted it away with one palm.

"Six Chaos Palms!"

Boom!!!

Under the terrifying power, the sword light of the Baili Sword Lord was blown away, and the whole person flew upside down, although he was not injured, but he was a little embarrassed.

On the other hand, Ye Tian stood still, extremely relaxed and calm.

"What !!"

The people present were all stunned, they originally thought that the Hundred Miles Sword Lord would be able to defeat Ye Tian with one move, but they never expected that Ye Tian would be so terrifying that he would easily shock the Hundred Miles Sword Lord.

Although the outcome was undecided, Ye Tian obviously had the upper hand in the collision just now.

"Allah, you are really very powerful, I underestimated you, but your cultivation is much worse than mine, no matter how powerful you are, you will definitely not be able to win me!"

The Hundred Miles Sword is the main way.

But although its voice is loud, it lacks confidence.

Obviously, the Baili Sword Master was a little less confident, not as confident as he was at the beginning.

Ye Tian's palm not only knocked him away, but also burst his heart.

"Furious Armor!"

"Hundred Miles Divine Sword!"

Rumble!!!

The appearance of two origin artifacts made the momentum of the Baili Sword Lord even better.

Then, the Baili Sword Lord urged the power of the small universe, and the phantom of the universe appeared behind him.

"Slash!"

The Baili Sword Lord struck again, this time it was all out, and the attack power was much stronger than just now.

Ye Tian deliberately showed a dignified expression, and immediately took out his Origin Artifact Long Knife, and unleashed the Heavenly Moon Knife at the pinnacle-level sword dao peerless level.

In addition, he didn't fully mobilize his physical strength and immortal power, otherwise it would be easy to kill the Baili Sword Lord in one blow.

Since it's a show, it's a little bit like it.

Bang!!!!

The collision between the two caused a monstrous shock, if it weren't for the fact that the space here had become extremely solid due to the influence of countless divine arrays, and the ring also had the effect of suppressing the escape of energy, otherwise this place would have collapsed and annihilated a long time ago.

Ye Tian kept fighting with the Hundred Miles Sword Lord, suppressing the Hundred Miles Sword Lord at the beginning, but he didn't give the Hundred Miles Sword Lord too much damage.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian used the Spatial Divine Power Hell Divine Void Spear, and he also did not cast the Hell Divine Void Spear of the Xiaocheng Realm, but only used the entry-level Hell Divine Void Spear, but he controlled the power of the Hell Divine Sky Spear, otherwise he would still kill the Hundred Miles Sword Master.

Bang!!!

The Hell's Divine Sky Spear injured the Baili Sword Master with a single blow, and then Ye Tian used the power of time to affect the Baili Sword Master, and kept using his sword skills.

Under Ye Tian's continuous attacks, the Hundred Miles Sword Lord finally couldn't bear it anymore.

Under the attack of the Hell's Divine Sky Spear again, the Hundred Miles Sword Lord was directly penetrated, fortunately he is a cosmic god, and he has a recovery talent, otherwise he would have died.

But even if he didn't die, the Baili Sword Master was extremely seriously injured, and he had no strength to fight at all.

"Allah, I admit defeat!"

The Baili Sword Master dragged his dying body seriously and admitted defeat.

This moment.

The other forces were stunned, and even the Bronze Luo Divine Lord of the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce was extremely shocked.

To be honest, the Tongluo Divine Lord didn't think that Ye Tian could beat the Hundred Miles Sword Lord before, it was not that he was not optimistic about Ye Tian's strength, but in his cognition, no matter how strong a person was, he couldn't use the cultivation of the third order of the galaxy level to challenge a Hundred Miles Sword Lord who was also the son of the universe at the peak realm of the Universe God.

It's simply impossible!

This is also a matter of vision, after all, the vision of the Lord of the Tongluo God is low, even some cosmic gods in the supreme hall of the human race can't think of it, only the supremes can roughly estimate part of Ye Tian's strength.

If they knew that Ye Tian's combat power was only a part, they would be absolutely dumbfounded.

"Baili Sword Master, you lost, Tiange challenged and won the Ten Light Sword Sect, according to the rules, Tiange will replace the Ten Light Sword Sect as one of the ten elder forces of Tianlan Giant City, and the business and resource distribution of the Ten Light Sword Sect in Tianlan Giant City will all be shared by Tiange, Baili Sword Lord, you don't have any meaning, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Baili Sword Lord said with a dead face: "No...... Meaning!"

He knew very well that once he returned to the Ten Light Sword Sect headquarters, he would definitely be severely punished, and he would even have to pay this part of the loss.

When he thought of this, he was extremely desperate.

"Does it make sense for other forces? If it makes sense, you can also challenge the Heavenly Pavilion, and I will take it all over Allah!"

Ye Tian yelled.

The representatives or leaders of the other forces looked at each other one by one, but no one dared to put forward the meaning.

Ye Tian's strength is too terrifying, stronger than the Hundred Miles Sword Lord, among the forces of Tianlan Giant City, if he can't dominate it, it is estimated that only a few cosmic gods can suppress Ye Tian.

Besides, Ye Tian is only at the third level of the galaxy level now, and when Ye Tian reaches the peak of the galaxy level, if he cultivates for a period of time, invincibility under the domination realm is definitely not empty words.

Therefore, they didn't dare to offend Ye Tian, and they couldn't afford to offend.

The Hundred Miles Sword Master and the rest of the Ten Light Sword Sect left here one after another, embarrassed to continue to stay here.

Everyone knew very well that the Ten Lights Sword Sect would soon launch the Tianlan Giant City.

Because of the loss of the aura of the patriarch-level force, coupled with the lack of resource allocation, it was impossible for the Ten Light Sword Sect to be a small force in Tianlan Giant City, so there was only this way to leave.

After everyone from the Ten Light Sword Sect left, the Bronze Luo Divine Lord of the Gaohe Chamber of Commerce stood up and said, "Let's congratulate Tiange on becoming one of the top ten elders of Tianlan Giant City, and then we will start discussing how to distribute the resources and territory of Tianlan Giant City!"

This meeting was discussed for three days and three nights, and some forces even used force to distribute resources among themselves, but Tiange was very relaxed, and there were almost no more disputes with other forces.

And Tiange is not greedy, even if it is the territory and resources of the Ten Light Sword Sect, Tiange does not want all of them, as long as the core part is made, some other marginal resources and territories are all given to other forces.

This is not Ye Tian's atmosphere, nor is it that Ye Tian does not dare to covet all the resources, but that Tiange is understaffed.

Tiange's foundation in Tianlan Giant City is too shallow, and if all of them accept those sites, businesses, and resources, Tiange's manpower will not be able to be arranged.

In addition, there is one more question -

There are too few strong people in Tiange, and they don't dare to recruit those strong people in a big way, because they are not loyal enough.

If there are not enough strong people to guard them, they will not be able to control those places at all, which will directly lead to the inability of these businesses to continue, and even lead to a state of loss.

Because of this, Tiange did not accept all those businesses, sites and resources, but exchanged for other benefits, such as some preferential policies and so on.

Moreover, after Ye Tian was ready, he once again took out the business that he couldn't operate, only allowing Tiange to develop steadily.

In this way, the developed Heavenly Pavilion can be regarded as truly powerful.

After the meeting, Ye Tian took the people back to the Tiange headquarters.

Next, it was the matter of accepting the land, business, and resources, which took Ye Tian about half a year in total.

Half a year later, Ye Tiancai finally handed over all the things to his wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu, and he entered the retreat again.

This time, he was going to raise his cultivation to the peak of the ninth order of the galaxy level, and then raise the other aspects one by one before going out of the level.
